nasb.text: So you shall attend to the obligations of the sanctuary and the obligations of the altar, so that there will no longer be wrath on the sons of Israel.

esv.text: And you shall keep guard over the sanctuary and over the altar, that there may never again be wrath on the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 你們要看守聖所和祭壇，免得震怒再臨到以色列人。

ccb.text: 你们要看守圣所和祭坛，以免我的愤怒再临到以色列人。
